MUTHUR.SettingBootTextHint: The text shown when a player's terminal first boots up in a session.
MUTHUR.SettingTypeSpeedHint: Milliseconds per character when MU/TH/UR's replies are typed out on your screen. Lower is faster.
MUTHUR.SettingPromptHint: The prompt string shown before the input line, e.g. INTERFACE 2037>
